bead.title: feat: add CLI governed workflow parity commands
bead.description:
Context: CONTRACT-008 defines CLI surfaces for `axon policy explain|test`, `axon mutation preview|commit|approve|reject`, `axon audit diff|blame`, and `axon rollback dry-run`. Gap assessment found the CLI behind this contract, especially in client mode. Low-effort apps and operators need these governed paths rather than direct unsafe writes.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-cli/src/` command definitions/service calls, focused CLI tests, and contract docs only if implementation discovers a necessary clarification.
Out-of-scope: UI repair views, CDC, and changing GraphQL/MCP semantics.
Implementation hint: route commands through existing governed handler/client APIs; where backend fields are absent, return stable documented errors rather than bypassing policy/audit.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-cli` passes.
2. CLI tests cover at least one policy explain/test command and one mutation preview/commit path.
3. CLI tests cover rollback dry-run or document a precise backend blocker in the bead notes without marking CONTRACT-008 complete.
4. `cargo clippy -p axon-cli -- -D warnings` passes.
